ResourceHeader.AlternateName: Observatory Group created to represent the chain of magnetic field stations used to calculate the Dst Index.

RevisionEvent.Note: Only known prior ReleaseDate of the metadata
Added HelioData InformationURL, Updated to SPASE Version 2.7.1. JWL

ResourceHeader.Description: Observatory Group created to represent the virtual chain of stations used to calculate the Dst Index. The chain of stations includes: Hermanus, Honolulu, Kakioka, and San Juan.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: If Dst Index data are used in publication kindly acknowledge the World Data Center C2 for Geomagnetism, Kyoto University for the index production and distribution.

InformationURL.Name: Geomagnetic Equatorial Dst index Home Page.
InformationURL.Description: web site with links to pages describing the internationally accepted standard technique for generating the Dst Index and for access to the index data in WDC format.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
